positive: A stylized celestial landscape featuring bioluminescent flora and glowing constellations over a mystical, calm forest clearing. The primary subject is a graceful, stylized deer silhouette reaching towards a crescent moon made of stardust. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, glowing sapphire, and accented with iridescent gold leaf details. Use a clean, high-contrast vector illustration style mixed with cosmic watercolor textures. Composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for placement on apparel. Lighting should be dramatic backlighting, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes and vibrant glows. Highly detailed, crisp edges, suitable for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacting, washed out, grayscale, photorealistic, realistic skin, messy lines
